title: Introduction to Tanya: Chabad's Foundational Text
title_he: מבוא לספר התניא: הטקסט היסודי של חב"ד
description: A chapter-by-chapter overview of Tanya's first section (Likutei Amarim), written for absolute beginners.
description_zh: 对Tanya第一部分(Likutei Amarim)的逐章概述，为完全初学者撰写。
description_he: סקירה פרק אחר פרק של החלק הראשון של התניא (ליקוטי אמרים), כתובה למתחילים מוחלטים.
author: Torah Light Editorial Team
key_concepts: Two Souls (Divine Soul and Animal Soul)
target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers with no prior knowledge of Chassidic philosophy or Jewish mysticism
learning_objectives: Understand what the Tanya is and who wrote it
Learn the concept of the two souls in every person
Understand the ideal of the Beinoni
Recognize how the Tanya's teachings apply to daily life
Appreciate the cultural parallels between Tanya and Chinese philosophy
